debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩,
    fun hfb => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (hfb.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.1) with ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => y.2.2 (hfx.symm.trans (hxa.symm ▸ h4))⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hfx
failed_attempts:
by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; apply Subtype.ext; injection h with hf; exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 hf
  · intro y
    rcases h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 with ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => y.2.2 (hxf ▸ hxa ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.ext; exact hxf

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hxA, hxa⟩ => ⟨f x, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩,
    fun hfb => hxa (h1 hxA h3 (h4.symm ▸ hfb))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1A, hx1a⟩ ⟨x2, hx2A, hx2a⟩ h; apply Subtype.eq
    exact h1 hx1A hx2A (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hyB, hyb⟩; rw [← h2] at hyB; rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => hyb (by rw [← hfx, hxa, h4])⟩; exact Subtype.eq hfx

by
  exists (λ x => ⟨f x.1, h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, λ h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; ext; exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val h)
  · rintro ⟨y, yB, yne⟩; obtain ⟨x, xA, fx⟩ := h2.symm ▸ yB
    exists ⟨x, xA, λ h => yne (by rw [← fx, h, h4])⟩
    ext; exact fx

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ⟨by rewrite [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩,
    fun h => hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ h
    apply Subtype.ext
    injection h with hf
    exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 hf
  · intros ⟨y, hy⟩
    have hyB := hy.1
    rewrite [← h2] at hyB
    rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, by intro h; rewrite [h, h4] at hxf; exact hy.2 hxf⟩
    apply Subtype.ext; exact hxf

by
  refine ⟨fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩,
    fun hfb => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 a x.2.1 h3 (hfb.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.1 x2.1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro ⟨y, hyB, hyb⟩
    rw [← h2] at hyB
    rcases hyB with ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩
    refine ⟨⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => hyb (by rw [← hfx, hxa, h4])⟩, by apply Subtype.ext; exact hfx⟩

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2.symm ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 h
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.1) with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => y.2.2 (hxa ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    rfl

by
  exists (λ x => ⟨f x.val, ⟨h2.symm ▸ ⟨x.val, x.property.1, rfl⟩,
    λ h => x.property.2 (h1 x.val a x.property.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 h
    apply Subtype.eq
    injection h with hf
    exact h1 x1.val x2.val x1.property.1 x2.property.1 hf
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.property.1) with ⟨x, hx, hfx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hx, λ h => y.property.2 (hfx ▸ h ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.eq; exact hfx

by
  exists (λ x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩,
    λ h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (by rw [h, h4]))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; apply Subtype.ext; exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.1) with ⟨x, hA, hx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hA, λ h => y.2.2 (by rw [← hx, h, h4])⟩
    apply Subtype.ext; exact hx

by
  exists (λ x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, λ h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 a x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply h1 x1.1 x2.1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1
    exact congrArg Subtype.val heq
  · intro y
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩ := (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.1)
    exists ⟨x, ⟨hxA, λ h => y.2.2 ((h ▸ hxf).symm.trans h4)⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hxf

by
  apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).mpr
  let F : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := λ ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ⟨h2 ▸ mem_image_of_mem f hx.1, λ h => hx.2 (h1 x hx.1 a h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  let G : ↑(B \ {b}) → ↑(A \ {a}) := λ ⟨y, hy⟩ =>
    let hx_exists := h2.symm ▸ hy.1
    ⟨Classical.choose hx_exists, (Classical.choose_spec hx_exists).1,
      λ h => hy.2 ((Classical.choose_spec hx_exists).2.symm.trans (h ▸ h4))⟩
  exists F, G; constructor
  · funext ⟨y, hy⟩; apply Subtype.ext; exact (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ hy.1)).2
  · funext ⟨x, hx⟩; apply Subtype.ext
    let hfx_exists := h2.symm ▸ (F ⟨x, hx⟩).2.1
    apply h1 (Classical.choose hfx_exists) (Classical.choose_spec hfx_exists).1 x hx.1
    exact (Classical.choose_spec hfx_exists).2

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.val, h2 ▸ ⟨x.val, x.property.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.property.2 (h1 x.val x.property.1 a h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h
    apply Subtype.ext
    have hf : f x1.val = f x2.val := congr_arg Subtype.val h
    exact h1 x1.val x1.property.1 x2.val x2.property.1 hf
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.property.1) with ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => y.property.2 (hfx ▸ hxa ▸ h4)⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hfx

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, ⟨x.2.1, rfl⟩⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 x.2.1 a h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; apply Subtype.ext; apply h1 x1.1 x1.2.1 x2.1 x2.2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩; have hyB : y ∈ B := hy.1; rw [← h2] at hyB
    rcall hyB with ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩; use ⟨x, ⟨xA, fun hxa => hy.2 (hxa ▸ h4)⟩⟩; rfl

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  let f' (x : ↑(A \ {a})) : ↑(B \ {b}) := ⟨f x.1,
    ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 a x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  let g' (y : ↑(B \ {b})) : ↑(A \ {a}) := ⟨Classical.choose (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1),
    let hx' := Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1)
    ⟨hx'.1, fun hxa => y.2.2 (hx'.2.symm.trans (hxa ▸ h4))⟩⟩
  exists f', g'; constructor
  · ext y; exact Subtype.ext (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1)).2
  · ext x; exact Subtype.ext (h1 _ _ (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ (f' x).2.1)).1 x.2.1
      (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ (f' x).2.1)).2)

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.val, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.val, x.property.1, rfl⟩,
    fun h => x.property.2 (h1 x.val x.property.1 a h3 (h4.symm ▸ h))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; ext; injection h with h_eq
    exact h1 x1.val x1.property.1 x2.val x2.property.1 h_eq
  · intro y
    rcases h2.symm ▸ y.property.1 with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
    use ⟨x, ⟨hxA, fun hxa => y.property.2 (hxa ▸ h4)⟩⟩
    rfl

by
  apply equinum_iff_inverse_pair.mpr
  let f' (x : ↑(A \ {a})) : ↑(B \ {b}) := ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩,
    λ h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 x.2.1 a h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  let g' (y : ↑(B \ {b})) : ↑(A \ {a}) := ⟨Classical.choose (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1),
    let hx := Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1); ⟨hx.1, λ h => y.2.2 (hx.2.symm.trans (h ▸ h4))⟩⟩
  refine ⟨f', g', ?_, ?_⟩
  · ext y; exact (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1)).2
  · ext x; exact h1 _ (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ (f' x).2.1)).1 x.1 x.2.1 (Classical.choose_spec (h2.symm ▸ (f' x).2.1)).2

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ image_intro f A x.1 x.2.1, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro x1 x2 h; apply Subtype.ext; apply h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1; exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1) with ⟨x, hx1, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨⟨x, hx1, fun h => y.2.2 ((congrArg f h).trans h4)⟩, Subtype.ext rfl⟩

by
  exists (fun ⟨x, hx⟩ => ⟨f x, ⟨h2.symm ▸ ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩, fun hfb => hx.2 (h1 hx.1 h3 (hfb.trans h4.symm))⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ h
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    rcases (show y ∈ image f A from h2.symm ▸ hy.1) with ⟨x, hxA, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => hy.2 (hxa ▸ h4)⟩, rfl⟩

  exists fun x => ⟨f x.1, h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 a x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 h; ext; injection h with hf; apply h1 x1.1 x2.1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 hf

  exists_i (λ x : ↑(A \ {a}) => ⟨f x.val, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.val, x.property.1, rfl⟩,
    λ h => x.property.2 (h1 x.property.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩)
  apply conj_i
  · intros x1 x2 h
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.property.1 x2.property.1 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro y
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩ := (h2.symm ▸ y.property.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.val)
    exists_i ⟨x, ⟨hxA, λ h_xa => y.property.2 (h4 ▸ h_xa ▸ hxf.symm)⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hxf

by
  let f' : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := λ x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩,
    λ h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  exists.intro f'
  constructor
  · assume x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val heq)
  · assume y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1) with ⟨x, hxA, hxfy⟩
    exists.intro ⟨x, ⟨hxA, by { assume hxa; apply y.2.2; rw [← hxfy, hxa, h4] }⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hxfy

  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ mem_image_of_mem f x.2.1, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.1 a x.2.1 h3 (h4.symm ▸ h))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ h

  · rintro ⟨y, hy⟩
    obtain ⟨x, xA, fx⟩ := (h2 ▸ hy.1 : y ∈ image f A)
    exact ⟨⟨x, ⟨xA, fun hxa => hy.2 (by rw [← fx, hxa, h4])⟩⟩, Subtype.ext fx⟩

    use ⟨x, ⟨hxA, λ hxa => y.property.2 (hfx ▸ hxa ▸ h4)⟩⟩; apply Subtype.ext; exact hfx

    exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congr_arg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro y
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ y.2.1 : ∃ x, x ∈ A ∧ f x = y.1) with ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩
    exists ⟨x, hxA, fun hxa => y.2.2 (hfx.symm.trans (hxa.symm ▸ h4))⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hfx

by
  exists (fun x => ⟨f x.1, ⟨h2 ▸ ⟨x.1, x.2.1, rfl⟩, fun h => x.2.2 (h1 x.2.1 h3 (h4 ▸ h))⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 hq
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.2.1 x2.2.1 (congrArg Subtype.val hq)
  · intro y
    obtain ⟨h_yB, h_yb⟩ := y.2
    obtain ⟨x, h_xA, h_xfx⟩ := (h2.symm ▸ h_yB : y.1 ∈ image f A)
    exact ⟨⟨x, h_xA, fun h_xa => h_yb (h_xfx ▸ h_xa ▸ h4)⟩, Subtype.ext h_xfx⟩
